content: Let me spawn 3 subagents, each evaluating vendors on a different dimension.
reasoning_content:
The user wants me to spawn 3 subagents to find which vendor is the best. But "best" is vague - I need to give them focused questions. Let me think about what dimensions could define "best" in a project context:

1. Compliance/completion status - which vendor has the most compliant submittals, fewest deviations
2. Schedule/delivery performance - which vendor is on time vs delayed
3. Quality issues - which vendor has clean quality record

Let me spawn 3 subagents with these focused questions.

function.name: investigate
function.arguments: {"tasks": [{"focus": "Vendor compliance — submittal & deviation analysis", "question": "List all vendors with submittal packages. For each vendor, count total submittals, how many are marked 'Comply' vs 'Deviation' vs 'Not Addressed'. Rank by clean compliance rate."}, {"focus": "Vendor schedule — delivery & PO performance", "question": "List all vendors with POs. For each vendor, show total PO value, count of POs, and any linked shipment or schedule delays, past-due milestones, or late deliveries. Rank by schedule health."}, {"focus": "Vendor quality — NCRs, issues & certification gaps", "question": "List all vendors and check for any linked quality issues (NCRs), certification readiness gaps, or open problems. Also check which vendors have RFIs or addenda responses. Rank by clean record."}]}
